action_boundary: May the operator execute this Government procurement / grants controls action now? Action: vendor onboarding with active SAM-style eligibility proof. Boundary: vendor self-certification cannot replace registry status.

records.content: Policy rule for Government procurement / grants controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.
